tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Retrieves a single account by its ID. Returns the account object or a 404 if not found.

tools.name: list_account_transactions
tools.description: Returns all transactions associated with a specific account ID.

id.description: The account ID whose transactions to retrieve.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: Returns the full list of all accounts in the demo store.

tools.name: list_card_transactions
tools.description: Returns all transactions associated with a specific card ID.

id.description: The card ID whose transactions to retrieve.

tools.name: list_cards
tools.description: Returns the full list of all cards in the demo store.

tools.name: dispatch_flowlet_action
tools.description: Accepts a stage action dispatched by a generated sandbox component and routes it through the demo policy handler. Write actions require approval per the governing policy.

tools.name: send_flowlet_chat
tools.description: Streams a Flowlet agent response over HTTP for a chat message. The agent is keyed by the current set of connected toolkits so newly connected integrations are picked up automatically.

tools.name: list_flowlet_integrations
tools.description: Returns the integration catalog with live connected flags for each toolkit. Optionally polls Composio for a specific connection's status by passing the status, id, and account query parameters; marks the toolkit connected in the demo store when Composio reports it as active.

status.description: Presence of this parameter switches the endpoint to status-polling mode.

id.description: The toolkit ID to poll status for (required when status is present).

account.description: The Composio connectedAccountId to poll (required when status is present).

tools.name: manage_flowlet_integration
tools.description: Manages toolkit integrations: 'authorize' begins/resumes OAuth and returns a redirectUrl and connectedAccountId; 'connect' fast-paths if already authorized or else starts OAuth; 'disconnect' removes the toolkit from the demo store.

id.description: The toolkit/integration ID to act on.

action.description: The action to perform on the integration.

tools.name: poll_flowlet
tools.description: Runs a detector tick that reads current transactions, matches active rules against any new charges, and fires configured actions (e.g. Slack notifications). Returns fired events so the client can surface confirmations.

tools.name: reset_flowlet
tools.description: Resets the entire demo to its pristine starting state by re-seeding data, clearing rules, resetting the poller baseline, and resetting connections. Returns { reset: true } on success.

tools.name: list_goals
tools.description: Returns the full list of financial goals from the demo store.

tools.name: get_budgets
tools.description: Returns budget insight data including category-level budget vs. spend summaries.

tools.name: get_cashflow
tools.description: Returns cashflow insight data showing income versus expenses over time.

tools.name: get_recurring
tools.description: Returns recurring transaction insight data identifying regular charges and subscriptions.

tools.name: get_spending_by_category
tools.description: Returns spending breakdown data grouped by transaction category.

tools.name: list_notifications
tools.description: Returns all notifications from the demo notification store.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Places a late-night delivery order, appending a new transaction to the store. The Flowlet poller will discover the new transaction on its next tick.

tools.name: list_payees
tools.description: Returns the full list of payees available for payments.

tools.name: list_scheduled_payments
tools.description: Returns all scheduled (upcoming) payments from the demo store.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Returns the current user's profile information from the demo store.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Retrieves a single transaction by its ID. Returns the transaction object or a 404 if not found.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: Returns a filtered, sorted, paginated list of transactions. Supports filtering by search text, category, accountId, status, date range (from/to), and amount range (min/max), with sort and cursor-based pagination via limit and cursor.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.
